R1: executed_by(tree, 'scan customer identity', 'system') and receive_exist(tree, 'customerDatabase') and condition_eventually_follows(tree, 'customerStatus == "new"', 'scan customer identity')
R2: exists(tree, 'store identity check record') and leads_to(tree, 'scan customer identity', 'store identity check record')
R3: data_leads_to_absence(tree, '(accountBalance <= 0) and (customerType not "VIP") and (managerApproval not "approved")', 'End Activity')

R4: condition_eventually_follows(tree, 'customerType == "VIP"', 'End Activity', scope='global') and data_leads_to_absence(tree, '(customerType == "VIP") and (accountBalance <= 0)', 'request manager approval')
